ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., Person search) */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policing operation associated with the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who conducted the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the incident */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the incident data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES policing_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policing_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policing operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the policing operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of policing operation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the operation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the operation */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "operation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the individual was involved in */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the individual */,
  "self_defined_ethnicity" TEXT /* Self-defined ethnic background of the individual */,
  "officer_defined_ethnicity" TEXT /* Officer-defined ethnic background of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "prior_convictions" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual has prior convictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislation" (
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislation */,
  "legislation_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislation */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the legislation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the legislation became effective */,
  "repeal_date" TEXT /* Date the legislation was repealed, if applicable */,
  "legislation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the legislation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects_of_search" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object of search */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object of search */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the object of search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the outcome was determined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the officer joined the force */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the officer (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_legislation" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislation related to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "legislation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_outcomes" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome related to the incident */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object of search related to the incident */,
  "outcome_linked" INTEGER /* Whether the outcome is linked to the object of search */,
  "removal_of_clothing" INTEGER /* Whether more than just outer clothing was removed */,
  "outcome_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the outcome */,
  "outcome_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the outcome in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_outcomes_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects_of_search ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_outcomes_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id")
)
